heading_structure.text: A Brooklyn Driving School Like No Other
Our driving school prepares you to pass the the road test in NY, get a license and drive safely, confidently, and responsibly.
Our driving school offers lessons for teenage first-time drivers, new adult learners, and existing drivers with lapsed licenses.Here's why you'll be glad you enrolled in our driving lessons:

text_content:
Driving School in Brooklyn | NYC – Pierre Paul Driving School Skip to content Brooklyn’s Most Trusted Driving School ADULT LESSONS TEEN LESSONS VIEW LESSON PACKAGES 4.8 Rated by 1,471+ Brooklyn Students Teens As a teen driving school, we let you you the freedom and privacy you want. You'll save money too! Teen driving program Adults It’s never too late to learn to drive become a better driver at a Brooklyn driving school. Adult driving lessons Packages/Pricing Our driving packages help new and inexperienced drivers earn a driver’s license. Brooklyn driving school packages 5 hour class Book the 5 hour prelicensing course. Our classes are informative and interesting 5 hour driving class Brooklyn Why Choose Pierre Paul Driving? 97% Success Rate 97 in 100 students that learn with us pass the road test on first try! DMV-CERTIFIED INSTRUCTORS You'll learn from knowledgeable, experienced and certified instructors. They're also friendly and patient. PERSONALIZED LESSONS Afraid of the NY highways? Failed the road test thrice? Disappointed by other driving schools in Brooklyn? We'll make the best driver out of you. Our driving school prepares you to pass the the road test in NY, get a license and drive safely, confidently, and responsibly. Book Lessons A Driving School You Can Trust: 4.8- Star Rating 11000+ Happy Customers 97% Success Rates View Available Services What Our Students Say Belisa Garcia      I had a great experience with this school! I passed my road test with their help. Everyone I met there was so kind and helpful. My instructor Melvin was patient and very knowledgeable. He’s a wonderful instructor. I got a compliment on my parking during my road test due to the technique he taught me. Thanks again, Pierre Paul driving school! Jermaine Doris      This driving school was ABSOLUTELY phenomenal! I had a life changing job opportunity riding on time getting a license within a few weeks. Ben, one of the best driving instructors I’ve ever seen, truly put me at ease with how thorough his lessons were! He said “You will not fail, I will make sure you are ready. Do not think of the job or the stress, I will help you get this done” and he got me in driving shape in no time. Please give this driving school a try and they will get you ready for the test in every way! Mareka Mohan      This is the best driving school in Brooklyn. The instructors are professional and knowledgeable in their craft. They give you honest and constructive criticism and I really appreciate that especially leading up to my driving test. I highly recommend this driving school, there methods are simple and you are guaranteed to pass once you follow their instructions/tips. Sharlene Moses      Hello guys I just wanted to say a big thank you to Pierre Paul Driving School. I was at two other driving schools that really didn’t help me after paying them a lot of money and all my money was wasted. However, thanks to my instructor Anthony that teaches me his method how to be a great driver and I finally got my licenses two days ago, I did a total of 12 driving lessons with Pierre Paul Driving School, big thank you to Anthony. TAKE ANTHONY GUYS, HE IS THE BEST. Frankie Allan      Absolutely loved my experience at Pierre Paul Driving School.
Everyone was super friendly and attentive to all my needs.
The driving instructor kept a relaxed feel in the vehicle and was super helpful with his lesson.
I felt more confident afterwards, and was able to attain my drivers license.
I would definitely recommend any new or experienced drivers to Pierre Paul Driving School. Kassy Harford      I’m super Grateful for this school, very professional and supportive. Thanks to Ben and Lou for being the best Instructors who will work with you and definitely be 100% honest. I PASS my road test within 1 month which was my goal!!! Best driving school in Brooklyn. Thanks 🙏🏽 Sarah Trenard      I Highly recommend Pierre Paul Driving school. Please do not waste your time in money going to other driving schools. I got my permit from the first go. Excellent Service. Thank you Mrs Paul for the five hours class and Mr Paul for the driving lesson.. Koko Mark      I did my road test in Brooklyn with Pierre Paul Driving school in Brooklyn I pass on my first try! They are the best driving school in Brooklyn, with patient instructors as well as hospitable office staff. The 5 hour class available online. Was very informative. I highly recommend this driving school. A Brooklyn Driving School Like No Other Our driving school offers lessons for teenage first-time drivers, new adult learners, and existing drivers with lapsed licenses. Here's why you'll be glad you enrolled in our driving lessons: Pick-up and drop-off between 7am and 11pm, so you can focus on driving lessons and not transport logistics. Watch your driving fears fade and confidence soar as you learn from our experienced, patient, and friendly DMV-certified instructors. Our 5 hour driving class is informative and engaging . You won’t notice the passage of time. High (97%) success rate ! Students who have failed the road test multiple times elsewhere pass on their first try with us. We provide driving instructor cars for the road test to ensure you’re comfortable and familiar with the car you’ll use during the test. Get world-class driving lessons at affordable driving school prices Personalized driving lessons : our driving instructors have the rare ability of turning nervous or discouraged beginner drivers into the most confident behind-the-wheel queens and kings. Multilingual lessons : learn how to drive in a language you’re most comfortable with, including English, French, Spanish, or Creole Book Driving Lessons Now PHONE: 718-576-6277 347-305-1712 (FAX) ADDRESS: 405 Rogers Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11225 EMAIL: info@pierrepauldriving.com
